jobs.title: Implementation Manager
jobs.content: <p><strong>Implementation Manager</strong></p><p>Shopmonkey is the vertical-SaaS shop-management + point-of-sale platform pioneered around the all-in-one auto-repair-shop & collision-shop operations data model.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Platform
jobs.content: <p>Lead Shopmonkey's Platform engineering function across Shopmonkey Cloud / Shopmonkey Pay / Shopmonkey Marketing / Shopmonkey Reporting.</p>
